name: douyin-local-video-lab
description: Download public short-video links for personal archiving, then analyze local videos with frame sampling and an Edge helper extension.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/douyin-download.js && node --check scripts/extract-frames.js && node --check scripts/make-contact-sheet.js && node --check scripts/github-upload.js && node --check extension/edge-video-downloader/background.js
